audit_items.proof_trace: Caller allocation_get_new_ch_info does not NULL-check return value of allocation_add_permission before dereferencing (lines 332, 334). allocation_add_permission can return NULL due to malloc/realloc failure.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends repeated STUN ChannelBind requests causing memory exhaustion; malloc fails returning NULL, leading to NULL pointer dereference.
